mapper.select: SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.menu_type IN ('M', 'C') ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.order_num
SELECT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id AND rm.role_id = #{roleId} WHERE m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.order_num
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_role_menu WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
